## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss pricing and packaging strategy for GrowthX, and align on website content approach for the upcoming launch.](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Move away from individual work stream pricing to outcome-based packaging (content, distribution, conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Create a separate page detailing work streams and team expertise without specific pricing](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Consider adding a high-value advisory service to anchor pricing and increase perceived value](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2830.0)
  - [Focus on transparency and simplicity in pricing presentation, while maintaining an air of exclusivity](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Topics

### Website Content Strategy

  - [Current website lists individual work streams with pricing (e.g., content at 9K, programmatic SEO at 12K)](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
  - [New approach: Create outcome-based packages (content, distribution, conversion) without specific pricing](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
  - [Maintain a separate page detailing all work streams and team expertise](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)
  - [Use hover effects to showcase team member profiles for each work stream](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2863.0)
  - [Consider adding a VIP/advisory service option to anchor pricing and increase perceived value](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2858.0)

### Pricing Transparency

  - [Aim for transparency without overwhelming potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [Use "starting at" pricing for packages to maintain flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2320.0)
  - [Include "Included in all plans" section to highlight core offerings](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Balance between providing enough information and maintaining curiosity to drive inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)

### Community and Lead Generation

  - [Explore creating an AI-led growth community as a marketing tool and potential revenue stream](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Consider offering workshops or webinars as lead magnets and upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [Leverage community access as an added value for clients (e.g., up to 10 team members per client)](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)

### Service Packaging

  - [Frame engagements as 12+ month programs with initial 12-week boot camps](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
  - [Emphasize the interconnected nature of services and how they reinforce each other](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Consider offering fractional CMO or advisory services as a high-value add-on](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)

### Brand Positioning

  - [Position GrowthX as a strategic partner rather than a traditional agency](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [Emphasize access to high-level expertise and advisory services](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [Create a sense of exclusivity and high value through pricing and packaging structure](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2967.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to create a draft of the new pricing and packaging structure based on the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=3514.0)
  - [Explore Framer as a potential tool for quickly creating a polished landing page](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Review logos and customer references to use in marketing materials, being mindful of sensitivities](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Consider developing a internal document with detailed service information to share after initial discovery calls](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=3477.0)
  - [Investigate adding a high-value advisory service to the offering mix](https://fathom.video/share/QGvXg5bdCbsN6eiqToW_nbW-S_RsjKh8?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
